'''Jorshmin''' was a frequent customer at the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] of [[Gorb Drig]] on [[Phorliss]]. He and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] struck up a friendship during her few weeks as a waitress there. He was killed in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] members coming to extort [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from Drig.

==Appearances==
